steps.title: Determine if the name is essential
steps.content: The phrase wildlife biologist alone does not identify a specific person. The name Dr. Purnima Devi Barman is essential to tell which biologist is on the front lines of conservation efforts.

steps.title: Do not set off the name
steps.content: B incorrectly uses a colon, C treats the essential name as extra information, and D uses only one comma. An essential identifying name should not be set off with punctuation. The answer is A.
